title: Match Input Type to Data Purpose
summary: Build and verify form input types in mobile emergency contact intake through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain form input types from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply form input types without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.instruction: Checkpoint 1: Which claim preserves form input types when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: mobile emergency contact intake.
steps.why: Match Input Type to Data Purpose makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 1 in mobile emergency contact intake.

content.text: Choose the claim that preserves purpose, native behavior, and understandable relationships when presentation changes.

Match Input Type to Data Purpose checkpoint 1: make the smallest repair that preserves earlier passing work.

options.text: Mobile emergency contact intake case 1: all short text values should use type text because other types only change appearance.
Mobile emergency contact intake case 1: choose the narrowest truthful input type, add inputmode only when useful, and test real device keyboards plus valid edge cases.
Mobile emergency contact intake case 1: use number for telephone numbers because every telephone number contains digits.

steps.title: 03 · Read the mobile emergency contact intake case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 3: Which claim preserves form input types when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: mobile emergency contact intake.
steps.why: Match Input Type to Data Purpose makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 3 in mobile emergency contact intake.

content.text: Purpose-specific input types expose useful semantics, browser validation, autofill, and mobile keyboards. Email, tel, date, number, url, and search are not visual themes. Inputmode can refine the on-screen keyboard without changing submitted data semantics. Type selection must allow realistic international values and must not pretend to prove identity or correctness. Apply it to mobile emergency contact intake.
